case_title: DOMINGUES, JANET vs. PETRIE, JOANN et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMINGUES, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT PETRIE, JOANN DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-18-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-20-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-29-1995

HEARING SET FOR APR-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
